common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this API to retrieve the current status and result of a video upload task. You can also use video_upload_result_push to get notified immediately when a video upload reaches a final status (SUCCEEDED, FAILED, or CANCELLED).

request_params.description: The unique ID of the upload task, returned by v2.media.init_video_upload.
request_params.name: video_upload_id

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message

response_params.description: Indicate warning message you should take care.
response_params.name: warning

response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.
response_params.name: request_id

children.description:
Current status of the upload task. Possible values:

- INITIATED: Upload task has been created (via init_video_upload) but no parts have been uploaded yet.

- UPLOADING: Video file parts are being uploaded. The upload has started but is not yet completed.

- UPLOADED: All video parts have been uploaded successfully, waiting for complete_video_upload to trigger processing.

- PROCESSING: Video is being transcoded/validated by the system (duration, format, resolution checks).

- SUCCEEDED: Video upload and transcoding completed successfully. Video URL and cover URL are available for use.

- FAILED: Upload or processing failed (e.g., invalid format, duration not within allowed range, transcoding error).

- CANCELLED: Upload task was explicitly canceled by the client (cancel_video_upload), and the video is discarded.
children.name: status

children.description: Detailed fail or cancel reason, will be returned if status is FAILED or CANCELLED.
children.name: reason

children.description: Transcoded video info, will be returned if status is SUCCEEDED.
children.name: video_info

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/media/get_video_upload_result?partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp&video_upload_id=sg-11110201-6kh48-mepm7a0ttcw3c3',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
